name: @semsql/sheets-demo
description: Browser demo for querying CSV and public Google Sheets data with @semsql/sheets.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['dist','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo','tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @semsql/sheets build && pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
